meaning: n.光泽的表面,光彩,欺人的表面,假象,注释vt.使有光彩,掩饰,上光于,注释,曲解vi.发光,作注释
examples: The gel gives your hair a gloss.
Sheets of rain were falling and produced a black gloss on the asphalt.
This paint has a fine gloss.
They found only one stick of lip gloss, and it was missing its cap.
Mother-of-pearl is used as a pristine gloss on the instrument cluster, knobs, and clock.
